calendar.matters:
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Oct-04-2013 Discharged

MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-26-2012 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-26-2012 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from The Presiding Judge Department 206 for Entry of Judgment.
Department 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Sydney E. Fairbairn, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff Clear Channel Broadcasting, Inc.
No appearance on behalf or by Defendant Simayof Inc.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1-10 dismissed without prejudice.
After evidence, Court ordered the following Judgment entered in favor of Plaintiff as follows:
Principal $29,207.00
Pre-Judgment Interest $11,162.10
Attorney's Fees $1,000.00
Costs $505.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $41,874.10
Plaintiff's counsel to prepare Judgment for the court's signature.
